---
title: "Blogs & Newsletters"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Blogs & Newsletters

## Sources surveillées

### Blogs techniques

| Blog | URL | Fréquence | Type |
|------|-----|-----------|------|
| latent.space | `latent.space` | Hebdomadaire | Interviews, analyses |
| Simon Willison | `simonwillison.net` | Quotidien | LLM, agents, tools |
| Anthropic Blog | `anthropic.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| OpenAI Blog | `openai.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Modèles, research |
| Google AI Blog | `blog.research.google` | Irrégulier | Research |
| Hugging Face Blog | `huggingface.co/blog` | Hebdomadaire | Modèles, open source |
| Mistral Blog | `mistral.ai/news` | Irrégulier | Modèles |
| Ollama Blog | `ollama.com/blog` | Irrégulier | Local LLMs |

### Newsletters

| Newsletter | URL | Fréquence | Source RSS |
|------------|-----|-----------|------------|
| The Batch | `deeplearning.ai/the-batch` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| TLDR AI | `tldr.tech/ai` | Quotidien | RSS |
| Import AI | `importai.substack.com` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| Ahead of AI | `magazine.sebastianraschka.com` | Mensuel | RSS |
| Last Week in AI | `lastweekin.ai` | Hebdomadaire | RSS |
| The Sequence | `thesequence.substack.com` | Quotidien | RSS |

### Agrégateurs

| Source | URL | Fréquence |
|--------|-----|-----------|
| Hacker News | `news.ycombinator.com` | Temps réel |
| Papers With Code | `paperswithcode.com` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/MachineLearning | `reddit.com/r/MachineLearning` | Quotidien |
| Reddit r/LocalLLaMA | `reddit.com/r/LocalLLaMA` | Quotidien |

## Pipeline RSS

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    RSS[Feeds RSS] --> PARSE[Parser feedparser]
    PARSE --> FILTER[Filtrage mots-clés]
    FILTER --> SCORE[Scoring pertinence]
    SCORE --> DEDUP[Déduplication]
    DEDUP --> FORMAT[Formatage Markdown]
    FORMAT --> FEED[Page .qmd]
    
    style RSS fill:#1565c0,color:#fff
    style FEED fill:#1b5e20,color:#fff
```

## Mots-clés de filtrage

| Catégorie | Mots-clés |
|-----------|-----------|
| Agentic | `agent`, `agentic`, `autonomous`, `tool calling`, `function calling` |
| LLMs | `GPT`, `Claude`, `Gemini`, `Llama`, `Mistral`, `Qwen`, `DeepSeek` |
| Inférence | `vLLM`, `SGLang`, `TensorRT`, `Ollama`, `llama.cpp` |
| RAG | `RAG`, `retrieval`, `GraphRAG`, `knowledge graph`, `embedding` |
| MCP | `MCP`, `model context protocol` |
| Code | `code agent`, `coding assistant`, `IDE`, `SWE-bench` |
| Hardware | `GPU`, `H100`, `B200`, `TPU`, `LPU`, `Groq` |

<!-- BLOG_FEED_START -->
### Last Week in AI #341 - Musk loses to OpenAI, Google's IO updates, OpenAI solves Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 27 May 2026
- **Score** : 3
- **Résumé** : Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion Suit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman, Google updates its Gemini app to take on ChatGPT and Claude at IO 2026, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-341-musk-loses-to

### A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-21T12:54
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Earlier this month I hosted a fireside chat session at the AI Engineer World's Fair with Cat Wu and Thariq Shihipar from Anthropic's Claude Code team. We talked about Claude Code, Claude Tag, Fable, c...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/21/cat-and-thariq/#atom-everything

### LWiAI Podcast #246 - Gemini 3.5 + Omni, Musk Loses, OpenAI vs Erdős
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 26 May 2026
- **Score** : 2
- **Résumé** : Google unveils AI model Gemini 3.5 and AI agent Gemini Spark, Omni turns images, audio, and text into video, Musk loses OpenAI court battle...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-246-gemini-35-omni

### [AINews] "Laguna S 2.1 Released: Cheaper than Deepseek v4 Flash, Better than V4 Pro"
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 23 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : a quiet day lets us highlight a new neolab win....
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-laguna-s-21-released-cheaper

### [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
- **Source** : latent.space
- **Date** : Thu, 16 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Thinky's first full LLM release is a banger and bonus: it's open weights!...
- **Lien** : https://www.latent.space/p/ainews-thinkys-inkling-975b-a41b

### Quoting Thomas Ptacek
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-22T23:59
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : I genuinely believe that if you took an open weights model from 2025 and built a pentest harness for it, it could do this kind of sandbox escape and scan/hack in most networks. This is only surprising...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/22/thomas-ptacek/#atom-everything

### OpenAI’s accidental cyberattack against Hugging Face is science fiction that happened
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-22T23:51
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : This story is wild. The short version: OpenAI were running a cybersecurity test against an unreleased model, with the model's guardrail features turned off. Rather than solve the test, the model broke...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/22/openai-cyberattack/#atom-everything

### Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-21T14:22
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac.
I'm really ex...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/21/nativ/#atom-everything

### Reverse-engineering is cheap now
- **Source** : Simon Willison
- **Date** : 2026-07-20T19:24
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : I keep hearing anecdotes from people who used coding agents to reverse-engineer and automate devices in their homes.
I think this is an interesting illustration of the impact of the reduced cost of wr...
- **Lien** : https://simonwillison.net/2026/Jul/20/cheap-reverse-engineering/#atom-everything

### Bringing Nunchaku 4-bit Diffusion Inference to Diffusers
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Thu, 23 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/nunchaku-diffusers

### What building Shippy taught us about building agents
- **Source** : Hugging Face Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 15 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : ...
- **Lien** : https://huggingface.co/blog/allenai/shippy-tech-blog

### Introducing OpenAI Presence
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 22 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-presence

### NTT DATA Group cuts incident analysis to 30 minutes with Codex
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Wed, 22 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : NTT DATA Group uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to help 9,000 employees automate work, cut incident analysis to 30 minutes, and scale secure AI adoption....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/ntt-data

### Introducing the ChatGPT for small business program
- **Source** : OpenAI Blog
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : OpenAI launches the ChatGPT for Small Businesses program, helping entrepreneurs build AI skills, automate work, and grow with ChatGPT Work....
- **Lien** : https://openai.com/index/introducing-chatgpt-small-business-program

### LWiAI Podcast #252 - GPT 5.6, Grok 4.5, Nemotron-Labs-Diffusion, AI 2040
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : GPT-5.6 and Grok 4.5, Meta's Muse Spark 1.1, regulatory developments in AI and data centers, interpretability research from Anthropic, and the future of AI policy with AI 2040...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-252-gpt-56-grok-45

### Last Week in AI #251 - Mythos Back, Sonnet 5, Etched, LongCat
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Trump lifts restrictions on Anthropic, Anthropic launches Claude Sonnet 5, Google's NotebookLM updates, chips stories from Etched and Baidu, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-251-mythos-back-sonnet

### Last Week in AI #250 - Mythos Mess, GPT 5.6-Sol, GLM 5.2
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Anthropic's AI treaty discussions, US government's influence on AI model releases, OpenAI's processor development, memory market impacts, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-250-mythos-mess-gpt

### LWiAI Podcast #248 - Opus 4.8, MAI, Anthropic IPO, Minimax-M3
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 21 Jul 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : Exploring Claude Fable 5&#8217;s impact, Siri AI&#8217;s latest enhancements, and the competitive IPO landscape shaping AI&#8217;s future...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-248-opus-48-mai-anthropic

### LWiAI Podcast #245 - TML-Interaction, Claude For Legal, Sam Altman on Stand
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Wed, 20 May 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API, Thinking Machines drops a new, highly responsive model designed for humanlike interactions in real time, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/lwiai-podcast-245-tml-interaction

### Last Week in AI #340 - OpenAI vs Musk + Microsoft, DeepSeek v4, Vision Banana
- **Source** : Last Week in AI
- **Date** : Tue, 05 May 2026
- **Score** : 1
- **Résumé** : First week of Musk v. Altman, OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal, DeepSeek previews new AI model that &#8216;closes the gap&#8217; with frontier models, and more!...
- **Lien** : https://lastweekin.ai/p/last-week-in-ai-340-openai-vs-musk

<!-- BLOG_FEED_END -->
